message.content:
I'll analyze this UI design in detail to help you replicate it exactly. This appears to be a code editor/IDE interface with an AI agent integration, using a dark theme with glassmorphism effects.

## Overall Layout
The interface is divided into four main sections:
1. **Top bar** - Contains the title and connection status
2. **Left sidebar** - File explorer and recent memory
3. **Central editor** - Code view with syntax highlighting
4. **Right sidebar** - AI agent interface and controls

## Color Scheme
- **Background**: Very dark gray/almost black (#1a1a1a or similar)
- **Primary accent**: Cyan/teal (#00bcd4 or similar)
- **Success green**: Bright green (#4caf50 or similar)
- **Warning yellow**: Yellow (#ffeb3b or similar)
- **Text colors**: Various shades of gray for different contexts
- **Code syntax colors**: Purple for imports, blue for decorators, etc.

## Components

### Top Bar
- Dark background matching the overall theme
- Left: "CONSTRUCT-PROJECT" text with folder icon
- Center: "Construct — memory-first AI agent" title
- Right: "Kimi K2.5 • local" text with cyan accent color
- Contains a three-dot menu icon on the far right

### Left Sidebar
- **File Explorer Section**:
  - Header with folder icon and "src/" label
  - Search icon at top
  - File tree with:
    - main.py (highlighted with yellow dot)
    - agent.py (with green dot)
    - memory.py (with green dot)
    - tools/ folder (collapsed)
    - tests/ folder (expanded)
    - test_agent.py
    - test_memory.py
    - requirements.txt
    - README.md
- **Recent Memory Section**:
  - Header with "RECENT MEMORY" text and clock icon
  - Three memory entries with colored dots (green, blue, yellow) and timestamps

### Central Editor
- Dark background with line numbers on the left (light gray)
- Code with syntax highlighting:
  - Purple for imports
  - Blue for decorators
  - Various colors for different code elements
- Green highlighted lines showing proposed code changes
- Red strikethrough for removed code
- Line 25 is currently active/selected

### Right Sidebar - Agent Interface
- **Agent Header**:
  - "Agent" text with robot icon
  - Green "running" status badge
- **Memory Recall**:
  - Green icon with "Recalled 3 relevant memories"
  - Cyan progress bar
- **Memory Context**:
  - Document icon
  - "Read memory context" title
  - "FastAPI project · snake_case · ruff · async" subtitle
- **Project Structure**:
  - Folder icon
  - "Scanned project structure" title
  - "8 files · 1,240 lines · 2 open issues" subtitle
- **Proposing Diff**:
  - Pencil icon
  - "Proposing diff — main.py" title
  - "Add pending_diff buffer for plan/act mode" subtitle
  - Code diff display with green additions and red removals
- **Run Tests**:
  - Play icon
  - "Run tests after apply" title
  - "pytest tests/ — awaiting approval" subtitle
- **Commit Message**:
  - Git icon
  - "Commit with message" title
  - "feat: add plan/act diff buffer to main.py" text
- **Action Buttons**:
  - Green "Apply diff" button with checkmark
  - Dark "Skip" button with X
  - Red stop button
- **Next Goal**:
  - Microphone icon
  - "Describe next goal..." placeholder text
  - Send button

### Bottom Bar
- Left: "memory active" with green dot and "Kimi K2.5 • local" with cyan dot
- Center: "main.py • line 25"
- Right: "feat/plan-act-mode • 2 pending • 0 errors"

## Typography
- **Font**: Monospace for code, sans-serif for UI text
- **Sizes**: 
  - Large for titles (16-18px)
  - Medium for regular text (14-15px)
  - Small for secondary information (12-13px)
- **Weights**: Regular for most text, medium for headings

## Visual Effects & Glassmorphism
- Subtle blur effects on panels
- Semi-transparent backgrounds with backdrop blur
- Soft shadows for depth
- Smooth transitions between states
- Hover effects on interactive elements

## Spacing
- Generous padding throughout (16-24px)
- Consistent margins between sections
- Proper line height for readability
- Adequate spacing between UI elements

This design follows modern dark theme principles with good contrast, clear hierarchy, and intuitive layout. The glassmorphism effects add depth without being distracting, and the color coding helps distinguish different types of information at a glance.
